task_completion.description: The agent successfully logged into the FreeMED application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or main interface is visible in a web browser.

task_completion.description: The agent navigated to the patient record for 'David Chen'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard, search results, or demographic page for 'David Chen' is visible.

task_completion.description: The agent opened the interface to add a new chart note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, dialog, or page for adding a new chart note is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the correct subject for the chart note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Accommodations - Interpreter Required' is visible in the subject or title field of the chart note form.

task_completion.description: The agent entered the required text into the chart note body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text containing 'certified ASL (American Sign Language) interpreter MUST be scheduled' is visible in the main text area of the chart note form.

task_completion.description: The agent saved or submitted the chart note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message is shown, the newly added note appears in the patient's chart history, or the save button is actively clicked.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to complete the task, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser, without terminal windows executing curl, mysql, or python scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual FreeMED application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text entry and navigation occur within the FreeMED web interface (URL http://localhost/freemed/ or FreeMED UI elements visible), not a local text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual output.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are open and being used to alter the DOM to show the note.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target patient is 'David Chen'. The chart note must have the exact subject 'Accommodations - Interpreter Required'. The body of the note must contain the exact text snippet: 'certified ASL (American Sign Language) interpreter MUST be scheduled'.
